case_title: APTEKAR, ROBERT G. et al vs. WILLIAMS, PETER JR. et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $100.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF APTEKAR, ROBERT G.
